title: MT❯3
content:
MT❯3 is Canada’s leading law firm specializing in providing advice and services relating to the management of digital information. We are a team of litigators, technical analysts, and project managers with extensive trial experience and a broad knowledge of electronic evidence.
Corporations, law firms and governments regularly retain us to manage their e-Discovery, information governance and technology strategy needs. MT❯3 offers a wide range of legal, strategic and technical services. We have built our reputation on delivering quality results and exceeding expectations.​
Since 2007, we have provided clients with expert advice and guidance in the following areas:
An experienced team of due diligence review lawyers undertake your mandate; easily assembled on short notice, the team can be quickly scaled according to project size.
Guiding you painlessly through the preservation, collection, processing and analysis of evidence.

### Information Governance
​Over time, stored information loses value, grows increasingly complex, and becomes a liability rather than an asset. Good information governance practices will solve that problem.
Document review is a necessary part of litigation, investigations, inquiries and regulatory compliance matters. MT❯3 has built its reputation on the quality, service and speed of its managed document review.
Our team of professionals is uniquely positioned to provide integrated and customized solutions for our clients’ information management needs:
- Senior Lawyers with decades of experience acting for blue-chip clients in complex litigation matters, all exclusively focused on e-Discovery and information governance matters.
- ​A Forensic Engineer who is a recognized expert in e-Discovery, and a co-author of one of the most important e-Discovery publications in North America.
- Project Managers and Case Managers with unparalleled experience in litigation support, e-Discovery and the management of high-volume document review.
- e-Discovery Analysts with the technical experience to get the most from many different litigation support technologies.
MT❯3 has collected over 115,000+ GB of data and analyzed more than 500,000,000+ documents.

### Innovation and thought leadership
MT❯3 leads the industry in e-Discovery research, providing clients with unbiased access to the most up to date resources in this ​fast-changing space.
Our professionals are considered to be the leading Canadian thinkers in the area of e-Discovery, information governance and data management. We regularly write papers, present at conferences and chair professional committees. We also provide clear and timely insight on our blog to keep clients informed of industry news and events.

### Cost-effective solutions
MT❯3 delivers solutions that are innovative, defensible, and cost-effective. Our strength lies in our years of experience advising our clients on issues such as preservation obligations, collection issues, and implementing the use of electronic tools to process and review electronic information.

### ​MT❯3 and McCarthy Tétrault
A division of McCarthy Tétrault since January 2017, MT❯3 continues to offer a competitive pricing structure, and an independent team operating from an independent office space.
